title: Coconut Sunday Serenity
description: A floral and silky dessert that captures the essence of a lazy Sunday in Tunisia featuring coconut flakes and infused with tropical flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together coconut flakes and sweetened condensed milk.
Add in vanilla extract, almond extract, baking powder, and coconut oil. Stir well until everything is evenly combined.
Pour the mixture into an ungreased 8x8 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle with unsweetened shredded coconut on top for added texture and color.
Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown. Be careful not to overbake as it can make the coconut flakes too hard.
Let it cool slightly before serving.
